common.selectServer: Pick a server in the selector on the left.

guildSelector.noServersHint: Install a template → the bot appears on the server → pick it here.

landing.title: Level up your community
landing.sub: Live alerts, guardian moderation, and ready-forged servers — one companion for streamers, VTubers, and the communities they raise.
landing.freeToBegin: Free to begin · Twitch · YouTube · Kick · TikTok

shop.title: Featured Realms
shop.sub: Ready-forged Discord servers — channels, roles, welcome flow, leveling and live alerts pre-wired. Install in one click after purchase.
shop.empty: The first templates land soon. Check back later.
shop.announce: Our shop is opening soon — ready-made Discord server templates and decorations for them: emojis, panels, dividers, icons, banners and much more.

final.title: Level Up Your Server
final.sub: Plant the companion on your server. Forge channels, summon alerts, raise your guild.

shop.title: The Shop
shop.sub: Ready-forged Discord realms — channels, roles, welcome flow, leveling and live alerts. Browse without an account; install after sign-in.

product.purchased: Purchased! Open the dashboard → My purchases to install.
product.buyHintLoggedIn: After purchase, go to the dashboard → My purchases → Install on a server.
product.buyHintGuest: Sign in with Discord to purchase. You can browse all realms without an account.
product.stillFilling: The realm is still being filled.

welcome.title: Welcome flow
welcome.sub: Messages on member join and leave. Each variant is a full copy with its own text, image and buttons. The bot picks one at random when it fires.
welcome.enabledSubWelcome: Send a welcome message when a new member joins
welcome.enabledSubGoodbye: Post in a channel when a member leaves
welcome.dmHint: The bot will DM the new member. If they have DMs from strangers turned off, the message won't arrive.

variants.subtitle: Up to 5 variants. The bot picks one at random.
variants.empty: No variants. Add at least one.
variants.label: Variant {{n}}

returning.title: Returning members
returning.sub: Separate pool of variants for members who were on the server before. Full settings, same as regular welcome.

image.title: Image
image.description: Generated banner with avatar and text — attached to this variant's message.

twitch.title: Twitch live notifications
twitch.sub: The bot sends an embed when the selected Twitch channel goes live. Single source of truth — changes here and via the /twitch command write to the same DB.
twitch.notConfigured: The bot isn't configured for Twitch — an administrator must set TWITCH_CLIENT_ID and TWITCH_CLIENT_SECRET in the bot's environment and restart. Adding channels won't work until then.

module.title: Twitch module
module.onSub: Enabled — the bot tracks the channels in the list and sends notifications.
module.offSub: Disabled — channels are saved but no notifications are sent. Flip the switch to resume.
module.emptySub: Enabled by default. Add your first Twitch channel below.

errors.limitReached: Limit reached. Remove a channel to free a slot.

list.empty: No channels tracked yet — fill in the form above.
list.title: Tracked channels

editor.contentHint: If it contains a URL, Discord's auto-preview is suppressed via SUPPRESS_EMBEDS.

serverLogs.title: Server logs
serverLogs.sub: Pick a channel for each log type. These settings can also be changed via the /logs set command in Discord.

serverMessages.title: Message templates
serverMessages.empty: No messages yet. Create one or install a server template.
serverMessages.selectServer: Pick a server in the selector at the top left.
serverMessages.selectServerHint: Once a template is installed, messages will show up here.
serverMessages.deleteConfirm: Delete this message? It will be deleted in Discord too.
serverMessages.contentPlaceholder: Plain text shown above the embed (or alone)
serverMessages.modalContentPlaceholder: Text users will see. Supports #channel and @role.

errors.needContent: Fill in either text or embed

personalization.title: Bot Personalization
personalization.sub: Make the bot's messages on your server look like your own bot — custom name and avatar via webhooks.
personalization.name: Custom bot name
personalization.avatarHint: PNG/JPG/GIF, up to 256 KB, at least 128×128. Discord may cache webhook avatars for up to an hour.
personalization.previewSentWebhook: Preview sent with your custom identity ✓
personalization.previewSentBot: Preview sent as the plain bot — check Manage Webhooks permission in that channel.
personalization.whatChanges: Welcome / goodbye / returning messages · Level-up notifications · Twitch live alerts · Published & scheduled messages
personalization.whatStays: Slash commands (/rank etc.) · The bot in the member list · Direct command replies · Bot embed footers
personalization.permWarning: The bot is missing the Manage Webhooks permission in these channels — messages there will fall back to the plain bot identity:
personalization.avatarFileHint: PNG, JPG or GIF · max 256 KB · at least 128×128 px
personalization.avatarOrUrl: Or paste a direct image URL
personalization.avatarErrType: Only PNG, JPG or GIF images are allowed
personalization.avatarErrSize: The image is too large — Discord allows up to 256 KB for webhook avatars
personalization.avatarErrSmall: The image is too small — at least 128×128 px is required

premium.lockTooltip: This feature is available on the Premium plan.
premium.modalBody: This feature is available on the Premium subscription.

reactionRoles.title: Reaction roles
reactionRoles.sub: Manage reactions and buttons that grant roles to members.
reactionRoles.selectServer: Pick a server in the selector at the top left.

reactions.activeDesc: All emoji → role bindings on this server. Removing one also drops the bot's reaction from the message.
reactions.empty: No reaction bindings yet. Click "Add reaction" to bind one.
reactions.noMessages: No messages — install a template first.
reactions.missingFields: Pick a message, emoji and role

buttons.empty: No messages on this server yet. Install a template to populate it.
buttons.noConfigured: No messages with buttons yet. Click "Add buttons" to configure one.
buttons.intro: Each message has its own buttons — added and saved independently. Click a message to expand the editor.
buttons.modalTitle: Pick a message to add buttons to
buttons.modalEmpty: All messages on this server already have buttons configured.

leveling.title: Leveling system
leveling.sub: XP for messages and voice chat, custom tiers, role rewards, exclusions. Notifications go to a channel or DM.

warning.title: Heads up: role hierarchy issues
warning.hint: Move the bot's role higher in your Discord server settings, otherwise it won't be able to assign these roles.

general.title: General
general.description: Master switch, level-up channel, message template
general.onlyTier: Only notify on tier change (skip regular level-ups)

sources.title: XP sources
sources.description: How much XP is awarded and for what
sources.voiceEnable: Voice XP — award per minute in voice

tiers.title: Tiers (ranks)
tiers.description: Custom names for level ranges. The tier shows next to the level on the rank card and leaderboard.
tiers.name: Name
tiers.milestoneHint: If set, sent on transition into this tier instead of a regular level-up

rewards.title: Role rewards
rewards.description: Up to {{limit}} rules. The bot's role must rank higher than the assigned roles in the hierarchy.
rewards.stackDesc: Receives every role along the way (5, 10, 20…)
rewards.replaceDesc: Only the role for the highest reached level

noXp.title: Exclusions
noXp.rolesHint: Members with these roles don't earn XP

card.title: Rank card (visual)
card.description: Colors and background. The preview updates automatically.
card.bgImageHint: Optional. If empty, the background color is used.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.confirmWipe1: Wipe XP of all members on this server? This is irreversible.
advanced.confirmWipe2: Really? This will erase all member progress.

audit.title: XP audit log
audit.description: Feed of every XP event — chat, voice, manual commands. Helps diagnose 'my XP isn't growing' complaints.

permissions.title: Command permissions
permissions.description: Choose who can use each leveling command. Server admins always bypass these rules.
permissions.noRoles: No roles configured — only admins will be able to use this command.

footer.tag: A Discord companion forged for streamers — live alerts, guardian moderation, ready-made realms.
footer.bottom: © Level Up · forged by a small moonlit studio

pricing.title: Premium
pricing.sub: Unlock everything for your server. One subscription per server, cancel anytime.
pricing.selectServer: Pick a server in the selector first.
pricing.successBody: Premium is being activated for your server — it usually takes a few seconds. Refresh the dashboard if the badge hasn't flipped yet.

features.freeList: 1 welcome variant · 1 Twitch channel · Standard welcome image (with watermark) · Leveling, reaction roles, logs
features.premiumList: Unlimited welcome variants · Goodbye + returning members · Custom welcome images, no watermark · Role Rewards · Multiple Twitch channels · Scheduled & recurring posts · Bot Personalization
